NOTICE OF MOTION TO STRIKE WORDS FROM THE CLAIM OF ORZELL LONG FILED ON AUG 20, 2008, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR OCT-29-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-29-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
STIPULATION AND ORDER TO REMOVE PAMELA UNDERWOOD'S NAME AS ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR CLAIMANT ORZELL LONG ON HIS CLAIM FILED ON AUGUST 20, 2008. FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING- ATTY. PAMELA A. UNDERWOOD INFORMED THE COURT THAT SHE IS NOT THE ATTORNEY OF RECORD OF CLAIMANT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE WORDS FROM THE CLAIM OF ORZELL LONG FILED ON AUG 20, 2008 IS OFF CALENDAR PER AMENDED CLAIM OPPOSING FORFEITURE FILED SEPTEMBER 29, 2008. STIPULATION AND ORDER TO REMOVE PAMELA UNDERWOOD AS ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR CLAIMANT ORZELL LONG SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189 301/PJB

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,400.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
